description: AWS::PCS::ComputeNodeGroup resource creates an AWS PCS compute node group.

NodeLifecycleStages.description: The ordered scripts to run at each compute node lifecycle stage.

NodeBootstrapped.description: Scripts to run after the node is bootstrapped, once the PCS configuration phase completes and before slurmd starts.
NodeBootstrapped.markdownDescription:
Scripts to run after the node is bootstrapped, once the PCS configuration phase completes and before slurmd starts.

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

NodeLifecycleScript.description: A single lifecycle script with its source, arguments, and error behavior.

ExecutionPolicy.description: Whether the script runs only on the node's first boot (FIRST_BOOT_ONLY) or on every boot including reboots (EVERY_BOOT). Defaults to FIRST_BOOT_ONLY.
ExecutionPolicy.markdownDescription:
Whether the script runs only on the node's first boot (FIRST_BOOT_ONLY) or on every boot including reboots (EVERY_BOOT). Defaults to FIRST_BOOT_ONLY.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: FIRST_BOOT_ONLY | EVERY_BOOT  
Update requires: No interruption

Update requires: No interruption

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: TERMINATE | STOP_SEQUENCE | CONTINUE

PurchaseOption.description: Specifies how EC2 instances are purchased on your behalf. AWS PCS supports On-Demand, Spot, Capacity Block, and Interruptible Capacity Reservation instances. For more information, see Instance purchasing options in the Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud User Guide. If you don't provide this option, it defaults to On-Demand.
PurchaseOption.markdownDescription:
Specifies how EC2 instances are purchased on your behalf. AWS PCS supports On-Demand, Spot, Capacity Block, and Interruptible Capacity Reservation instances. For more information, see Instance purchasing options in the Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud User Guide. If you don't provide this option, it defaults to On-Demand.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ONDEMAND | SPOT | CAPACITY_BLOCK | INTERRUPTIBLE_CAPACITY_RESERVATION  
Update requires: No interruption

The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM instance profile used to pass an IAM role when launching EC2 instances. The role contained in your instance profile must have pcs:RegisterComputeNodeGroupInstance permissions attached to provision instances correctly.
